# Changelog

## What's Changed in cache@0.32.6<!-- RELEASE NOTES START -->

### ⛰️  Features

* credo — flag directives inside ExUnit block macros by [@fortmarek](https://github.com/fortmarek) in [#10895](https://github.com/tuist/tuist/pull/10895)
### 🐛 Bug Fixes

* support private CAs for cache-to-server auth by [@pepicrft](https://github.com/pepicrft) in [#10903](https://github.com/tuist/tuist/pull/10903)
